description: OT — Nozomi process-variable anomaly cross-correlation. Detects the ANSSI 2014 German steel-mill pattern: HMI/EWS pivot → unauthorized PLC writes (Modbus FC 5/6/15/16, WRITE_VAR) → PV deviations across SAFETY/BLAST_FURNACE zone → blocked shutdown. Cross-correlates write activity with PV-anomaly alerts per minute per asset. MITRE ATT&CK for ICS T0836/T0855/T0858/T0831.

graphs.title: PV anomaly alerts (24h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group n = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" )

graphs.title: Unauthorized PLC writes (24h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group n = count( function_code == "5" or function_code == "6" or function_code == "15" or function_code == "16" or function_code == "WRITE_VAR" )

graphs.title: Safety-zone protocol violations (24h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group n = count( zone == "SAFETY" and alert_type == "PROTOCOL_VIOLATION" )

graphs.title: New protocols / function codes (24h)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group n = count( alert_type == "NEW_PROTOCOL" or alert_type == "NEW_FUNCTION_CODE" )

graphs.title: PV anomalies by zone (hourly)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group anomalies = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" ) by hour = timebucket('1 hour'), zone
| filter zone = *
| sort hour

graphs.title: PLC writes vs PV anomalies (hourly) — co-occurrence
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group
    writes    = count( function_code == "5" or function_code == "6" or function_code == "15" or function_code == "16" or function_code == "WRITE_VAR" ),
    anomalies = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" )
  by hour = timebucket('1 hour')
| sort hour

graphs.title: Top assets by PV anomaly count
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group anomalies = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" ) by asset_name, zone
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - anomalies
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top deviating process variables
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"process_variable": "$process_variable{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group anomalies = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" ) by process_variable, asset_name
| filter process_variable = *
| sort - anomalies
| limit 20

graphs.title: BLAST_FURNACE/SAFETY writes correlated with PV anomalies (same minute, same asset)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| group
    writes    = count( (zone == "BLAST_FURNACE" or zone == "SAFETY") and (function_code == "5" or function_code == "6" or function_code == "15" or function_code == "16" or function_code == "WRITE_VAR") ),
    anomalies = count( alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY" )
  by min = timebucket('1 minute'), asset_name
| filter writes > 0 and anomalies > 0
| group corr_minutes = count(), total_writes = sum(writes), total_anom = sum(anomalies) by asset_name
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - corr_minutes, - total_anom
| limit 20

graphs.title: Writes targeting SAFETY zone
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"src_ip": "$src_ip{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter zone == "SAFETY"
| filter function_code == "5" or function_code == "6" or function_code == "15" or function_code == "16" or function_code == "WRITE_VAR" or function_code == "STOP_PLC" or function_code == "FORCE_OUTPUT"
| group writes = count() by asset_name, src_ip, function_code
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - writes
| limit 30

graphs.title: Programming / firmware download attempts
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"src_ip": "$src_ip{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter alert_type == "PLC_PROGRAM_UPLOAD" or alert_type == "PLC_PROGRAM_DOWNLOAD" or alert_type == "FIRMWARE_UPDATE" or alert_type == "CHANGE_OPERATING_MODE"
| group attempts = count() by asset_name, zone, src_ip, alert_type
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - attempts
| limit 30

graphs.title: Top source IPs writing to PLCs
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"src_ip": "$src_ip{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"dst_ip": "$dst_ip{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter function_code == "5" or function_code == "6" or function_code == "15" or function_code == "16" or function_code == "WRITE_VAR"
| group writes = count() by src_ip, dst_ip
| filter src_ip = *
| sort - writes
| limit 20

graphs.title: New protocols / function codes (baseline drift)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"protocol": "$protocol{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"function_code": "$function_code{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter alert_type == "NEW_PROTOCOL" or alert_type == "NEW_FUNCTION_CODE"
| group n = count() by asset_name, protocol, function_code
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - n
| limit 20

graphs.title: Largest PV deviations (top 30)
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"process_variable": "$process_variable{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"value": $pv_value{regex=-?[0-9.]+}$' from message
| parse '"baseline": $pv_baseline{regex=-?[0-9.]+}$' from message
| parse '"deviation": $pv_deviation{regex=-?[0-9.]+}$' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter alert_type == "PROCESS_VARIABLE_ANOMALY"
| group max_dev = max(pv_deviation), last_val = max(pv_value), last_base = max(pv_baseline) by asset_name, zone, process_variable
| filter process_variable = *
| sort - max_dev
| limit 30

graphs.title: Safety PLC stop/start commands
graphs.query:
| filter( dataset == 'nozomi' )
| parse '"alert_type": "$alert_type{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"asset_name": "$asset_name{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"src_ip": "$src_ip{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| parse '"zone": "$zone{regex=[^"]+}$"' from message
| filter alert_type == "STOP_PLC" or alert_type == "START_PLC" or alert_type == "CHANGE_OPERATING_MODE"
| filter zone == "SAFETY" or zone == "BLAST_FURNACE"
| group n = count() by asset_name, zone, src_ip, alert_type
| filter asset_name = *
| sort - n
